subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath come upon clouds of light with manifest radiance, and round about Him are the denizens of the Supreme Concourse and the angels [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من اتی علی ظلل الانوار بضیاء مبین و فی حوله اهل ملا الاعلی و ملئکه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
